title: Perihelion
description: A dimension mod focused around traveling to the sun
body: # Perihelion ## A dimension mod themed around the sun and solar energy **INDEV: Parts of the mod are incomplete** [](https://modfest.net/1.20) ## Getting Started - Find and (if lucky) excavate a gravel patch on the floor of an Old Growth or Jungle biome - Travel to the sun by walking onto the Singularity Projector below the wooden boards - Make your way into the base of the icy structure to discover the Solar Sail Boat and Solar Beam block - Use the boat to sail solar winds from below and travel to the nearby space station, discover sources of silicon to craft new decoration blocks, solar beams, and solar sail boats - Use solar beams and boats to create more efficient water transportation networks in the overworld, or build your own stations and boat launches on the sun - Travel to farther away space stations; discover sources of silicon crystals to craft more decorative blocks and solar sail boats
